source_pr.title: util/chunk: some minor refactors
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?
splitted from https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/26772

Problem Summary:

some minor refactors
- add some comments
- remove unused `preAlloc` and `insert`
- remove unused parameter `old` in `newVarLenColumn(cap int, old *Column)`



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte
failure_signature: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte
fix_pattern: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte

evidence: evidence: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte
files: util/chunk/chunk.go, util/chunk/chunk_test.go, util/chunk/column.go, util/chunk/column_test.go, util/chunk/list.go, util/chunk/list_test.go, util/chunk/pool.go
